title: fraxinus punctata
intro: Fraxinus punctata, also known as the prickly ash or vernal ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of berberine and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Fraxinus punctata include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Fraxinus punctata is often prepared as a root bark extract, tincture, or tea, and is commonly used in herbal supplements and traditional medicine.
